hero.sub: Chat, CRM, Mail, Drive, Calendar, Video, AI Search, LLM Orchestration, Web Automation, Content Generation, Knowledge Base, Documents, Spreadsheets, Projects — all in one open platform. Self-hosted, private, and built to scale from personal productivity to enterprise-wide AI deployment.
philosophy.title: No Forms. Just Conversations.
philosophy.text: Since 2017 we have championed a simple idea: people should converse, not fill forms. Traditional software forces rigid forms with dropdowns and checkboxes. General Bots replaces them with natural conversation — guided by AI, backed by your data, connected to every channel.
features10.title: Applications with Dedicated Pages
features10.sub: Each of these capabilities has its own deep-dive page. Click to learn more.
feature.ai-search.desc: Semantic search across millions of documents. RAG-powered with cited sources.
feature.bot-factory.desc: Mass-produce bots from templates. Multi-tenant. Centralized management.
feature.broadcast.desc: Precision mass communication. Rate limiting, segmentation, reply loops.
feature.content-gen.desc: AI content with brand voice. SEO-optimized. Atomic templates.
feature.create-apis.desc: Build REST APIs from Word documents. Deploy instantly.
feature.llm-tools.desc: Multi-model orchestration. Summarization, translation, sentiment analysis.
feature.talk-to-data.desc: Query databases and spreadsheets in natural language. Instant insights.
feature.training.desc: Continuous bot training. Automated chunking. Knowledge hot-swapping.
feature.web-automation.desc: Headless browser orchestration. Scrape, fill forms, extract data.
feature.all.desc: Browse the complete platform map with 75+ applications.
cta.title: Start Building Today
cta.sub: 75+ applications. One platform. Open source. Self-hosted or managed — same software, your choice. Personal, business, or enterprise scale.
features.hero.title: The Complete AI Platform
features.hero.sub: Chat, CRM, Mail, Drive, Calendar, AI Search — every application you need, integrated into one open platform. From personal productivity to enterprise-scale AI.
features.matrix.title: Feature Matrix
features.matrix.sub: Nine integrated capabilities — each with its own dedicated deep-dive page.
integrations.hero.title: Connected Ecosystem
integrations.hero.sub: Every channel, every tool, every data source — connected through one intelligent platform. WhatsApp, Teams, Email, CRM, Drive, Calendar, and AI.
features.ai-search.title: AI Search — Semantic RAG Engine
features.ai-search.hero_sub: Traditional search matches keywords. General Bots AI Search understands meaning, providing precise answers derived from your documents.
features.bot-factory.title: Bot Factory — Multi-Bot Orchestration
features.bot-factory.hero_sub: Mass-produce bots from central templates, manage multi-tenant deployments, and scale your digital workforce from a unified dashboard.
features.broadcast.title: Broadcast — Precision Mass Communication
features.broadcast.hero_sub: Run targeted campaigns, schedule messages across time zones, and track engagement with real-time analytics across all your channels.
features.content-generation.title: Content Generation — AI Writing Engine
features.content-generation.hero_sub: Generate on-brand, SEO-optimized content at scale. From technical documentation to marketing campaigns.
features.create-apis-in-word.title: Create APIs in BASIC — Universal API Development
features.create-apis-in-word.hero_sub: Write API logic using BASIC syntax directly inside Word documents. No IDE, no complex toolchains.
features.llm-tools.title: LLM Tools — Multi-Model Orchestration
features.llm-tools.hero_sub: Integrate any LLM provider into your workflows. From summarization and translation to sentiment analysis and semantic caching.
features.talk-to-data.title: Talk to Data — Conversational Analytics
features.talk-to-data.hero_sub: Ask questions in natural language and get instant answers from your databases and spreadsheets.
features.trainning.title: Knowledge Training — Continuous Bot Learning
features.trainning.hero_sub: Build specialized bots by training them on your proprietary documents, FAQs, and structured datasets.
features.web-automation.title: Web Automation — Industrial Web Orchestration
features.web-automation.hero_sub: Automate complex web interactions, scrape structured data, and bridge legacy web assets with modern conversational interfaces.
integrations.channels.whatsapp.hero_sub: Deploy high-fidelity AI Search and deterministic bot orchestration on the world's most popular messaging channel.
integrations.channels.microsoft-teams.he: Native Teams bot framework with adaptive cards, channel messaging, and threaded conversations.
integrations.channels.slack.hero_sub: Full Slack Bot API with slash commands, interactive messages, and enterprise grid support.
integrations.channels.google-chat.hero_s: Google Chat API with card-based messages, slash commands, and Google Workspace sync.
integrations.channels.instagram.hero_sub: Instagram Messaging API for DM automation, comment moderation, and story engagement.
integrations.channels.facebook-pages.her: Full Messenger Platform integration with handover protocol and page inbox management.
integrations.channels.sms.hero_sub: Global SMS gateway with two-way conversations and high deliverability.
integrations.channels.email.hero_sub: IMAP and SMTP integration with AI-powered auto-reply and email campaign management.
integrations.channels.web-chat.hero_sub: Customizable chat widget with WebSocket real-time messaging and cross-browser support.
integrations.enterprise.minio.hero_sub: High-performance S3-compatible object storage for documents, images, and backups.
integrations.enterprise.project.hero_sub: Import MS Project files, generate Gantt charts, and automate project reporting.
integrations.enterprise.sharepoint.hero_: Connect to SharePoint for document processing, search indexing, and content management.
integrations.team-work.whatsapp-facebook: Unified employee communication bridging WhatsApp and Workplace.
integrations.team-work.whatsapp-google-w: Calendar, Drive, and Gmail access via WhatsApp.
integrations.team-work.whatsapp-microsof: Cross-platform messaging bridge between WhatsApp and Teams.
integrations.virtual-assistants.chat-gpt: Connect General Bots to OpenAI ChatGPT models via API.
integrations.virtual-assistants.microsof: Extend Copilot with General Bots knowledge bases and multi-channel support.
integrations.virtual-assistants.alexa.he: Build Alexa skills powered by General Bots AI.
general-bots.llm.hero:
The LLM Orchestrator.
Built for Speed,
Built for Choice.
general-bots.llm.hero_sub: A high-performance, LLM orchestration engine that connects to any model provider — from frontier models like Claude and GPT to cost-effective alternatives like GLM, Qwen, DeepSeek, Kimi, and MiniMax.
general-bots.vector-retrieval.hero_sub: Vector Retrieval is the foundation of modern AI applications. General Bots integrates vector databases like Qdrant to give your bots a high-performance, semantic memory.
general-bots.open-source.hero_sub: General Bots is AGPL-3.0 licensed. No vendor lock-in, full transparency, community-driven since 2017.
pricing.hero_sub: General Bots is Open Source. Self-host for free, or choose a certified partner for managed hosting with 99.9% uptime SLA.
contact.hero_sub: Have a project in mind? We’d love to hear from you.
